name: A Masterpiece Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix well and pat into a greased 9-inch spring form pan (grease the bottom of the pan only).
2. Place in refrigerator while making the filling.
3. Filling: 1 pound cream cheese, 3 eggs, 1/2 cup sugar.
4. Beat well and pour into pie crust.
5. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes only.
6. Remove from oven and cool. Cake may be decorated with any variety of fruits, canned or in season. You can be most innovative with this recipe, using coffee, almonds or pumpkin and spices, etc., as the spirit moves you.
